source_quote: After a period of perfect suspend/resume cycles the LPC will not wake up the board; the LCD shows "Waking up LPC… 0%" and goes blank after a short time (~400 ms). LPC firmware fails to resume properly after long suspend/resume cycles.

evidence.reasoning: Source repeatedly mentions 'LPC' (alias of canonical 'LPC controller'); bridge maps to U14.
LPC fails to wake from suspend — effectively non-responsive, modelled as dead.
